calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
AUBREY WELDON, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff JULIE ACIERTO
ROXANNA PEZZY, Esq. on behalf of defendants MICHAEL CHOI AND WIN KEE FOOD PRODUCTS

The parties settled this matter after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendants Micahel Choi and Win Kee Food Products to pay plaintiff Julie Acierto the sum of $7,000.00 which includes all liens within one week. Each side to bear their own costs. All parties agreed to the settlement on the record.

JUDGE PRO TEM: James Fleming; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Bob Balian
